task_completion.description: Open the 'Standard Visitor' badge template in the badge designer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The badge designer interface is visible with 'Standard Visitor' selected or displayed as the active template being edited.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Host:' label to the badge template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The static text 'Host:' is visible on the badge canvas within the designer interface.

task_completion.description: Add the Host's Full Name data field to the badge template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placeholder, variable block, or data field representing the Host's Full Name (e.g., '[Host Name]', '{{host_name}}') is visible on the badge canvas, typically near the 'Host:' label.

task_completion.description: Register a visitor named Alice Verifier with Bob Manager as the host.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visitor registration form, check-in screen, or visitor log shows 'Alice Verifier' entered as the visitor name and 'Bob Manager' selected or entered as the host.

task_completion.description: Open the badge print preview for the registered visitor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print preview modal, window, or screen is open, displaying the rendered badge for the visitor.

task_completion.description: Verify the print preview shows the correct visitor and host details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered badge in the print preview explicitly displays the visitor name 'Alice Verifier' and the exact text 'Host: Bob Manager'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual visitor management application's GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the application's graphical interface (menus, forms, buttons) being used to edit the template and register the visitor, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the print preview is a genuine application feature and not a mocked image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The print preview should appear within the context of the application's UI (e.g., containing standard print/close buttons or modal borders), not in a standalone image editor or text document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final 'Host: Bob Manager' text must be rendered inside a graphical badge preview, not just typed out in a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot must be saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/badge_host_proof.png'. The visitor name must be exactly 'Alice Verifier'. The host name must be exactly 'Bob Manager'. The final badge preview must explicitly show the text 'Host: Bob Manager'.
